baseline.reason: Accurately identifies the NULL pointer dereference in ossl_quic_get_cipher_by_char (line 321) where ciph from ssl3_get_cipher_by_char can be NULL when ossl_bsearch fails to find a matching cipher. Correctly traces the full trigger path from entry through binary search failure to the NULL dereference sink. No unsupported speculation.

vastdb.reason: Accurately identifies the same NULL pointer dereference root cause, correctly pinpoints ossl_bsearch line 254-255 as the NULL source and ciph->algorithm2 dereference at line 321 as the sink. Traces the trigger path correctly from entry through ssl3_get_cipher_by_char/ssl3_get_cipher_by_id to the vulnerable dereference. No unsupported speculation.
